name: Creme Brulee Aux Fruits (Creme Brulee with Fruits)
recipeInstructions:
Day before:
1. In the bottom of a double boiler, heat cream until scalded. In the top of the double boiler, beat yolks with granulated sugar. Slowly stir cream into yolks.
2. Cook the mixture over hot, not boiling, water until it coats a spoon. Add vanilla. Refrigerate in 1- to 1 1/2-quart ovenware casserole or flat baking dish.
Just before serving:
1. Over the custard, sprinkle brown sugar.
2. Set the custard dish in a pan; surround with ice cubes. Broil the custard until the sugar caramelizes -- about 1 minute.
3. Break the brown-sugar crust by tapping with a spoon, and serve at once over fruits, in individual dishes or sherbet glasses. Makes 6 servings.
